mapper.select: SELECT comment_no, content, user_id, reg_date FROM comment_board WHERE comment_no > 0 and board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY comment_no DESC, reg_date DESC
SELECT comment_no,board_no, content, FROM comment_board WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment_board SET content =#{content} WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo}
